title: Force-Deflection Sweep HDF5 Schema
description: Defines the HDF5 file structure produced by ForceDeflection_V3.py. Each file contains a multi-position FD sweep: at each motor position, one or more FD cycles are recorded. This schema documents groups, datasets, and attributes so analysis tools can be built independently.

Metadata.description: Test configuration and metadata stored as HDF5 attributes on this group.

DateTimeISO.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of test start, e.g. 2026-02-25T14:30:00

TotalPositions.description: Number of motor positions in the sweep

MotorStepSize_steps.description: Motor step size between positions in steps

MotorSpeed_steps_s.description: Motor speed in steps per second

FD_StepSize_mm.description: FD actuator step size per measurement point in mm

FD_TotalDistance_mm.description: Total FD travel distance per segment in mm

FD_ForceAverages.description: Number of force readings averaged per measurement point

FD_ForceLimit_N.description: User-configured force abort threshold in Newtons

FD_DirectionPattern.description: Direction pattern name: 'Push only', 'Pull only', 'Push-Pull', or 'Pull-Push'

FD_CyclesPerPosition.description: Number of FD cycles run at each motor position

FDRuns.description: Contains one sub-group per motor position (P0, P1, P2, ...).

P{n}.description: Data for motor position n (0-based). Group name is 'P0', 'P1', etc.

motor_position_steps.description: Cumulative motor position in steps from the starting position

displacement_mm.description: FD actuator displacement in mm for each measurement point. N = total points across all cycles and phases at this position.

force_n.description: Averaged force reading in Newtons for each measurement point. Same length as displacement_mm.

cycle.description: 1-based cycle number for each measurement point.

phase.description: Phase name for each measurement point: 'push' or 'pull'.

Statistics.description: Summary statistics computed from the measurement data at this position.

max_force_n.description: Maximum force recorded at this position in N

min_force_n.description: Minimum force recorded at this position in N

num_points.description: Total number of measurement points at this position

zero_crossings.description: JSON array of zero-crossing objects: [{"position_mm": float, "slope_N_per_mm": float}, ...]. Empty array '[]' if no crossings found.

Plot.description: Rendered plot images for this position.

fd_plot.description: PNG image of the force-displacement plot for this position, stored as raw bytes.

overview_plot.description: PNG image of all positions overlaid on a single force-displacement plot.
